name: SPHERE FRONTIER — Quest Explorer
postCreateCommand: echo '🚀 SPHERE FRONTIER DevContainer ready!' && echo '' && echo '📂 Quest structure:' && find . -name '*.md' -path '*/quests/*' -exec echo '  →' {} \; 2>/dev/null || echo '  No quests/ folder in this repo' && echo '' && echo '💡 Open any quest .md file to start your path.'
